steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT * FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '76.483.817/0001-20' AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '76.483.817/0001-20' AND ANALYSIS_START_PERIOD_DATE >= '2024-12-01' AND ANALYSIS_START_PERIOD_DATE <= '2024-12-31') ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT * FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '76.483.817/0001-20' AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '76.483.817/0001-20' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31')"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
